title.en: 08 Read-only Review of an Authenticated Web Page

observation.zh: 账单概览加载成功，有一条付款提醒
observation.en: Billing overview loaded with one payment notice

observation.zh: 更改计划、提交付款、删除成员均未点击
observation.en: Change plan, submit payment, and delete member were not clicked

observation.zh: 邮箱和余额区域已遮挡
observation.en: Email and balance area are hidden

observation.zh: 付款提醒需要用户自行打开确认

zh: 人工确认当前 URL 和页面标题是否符合检查目标。
人工逐项核对 no-click-controls.md 中的按钮均未触发。
人工检查 safe-screenshots/ 中无邮箱、余额、账号 ID 或私人资料。
en: Manually confirm the current URL and page title match the review goal.
Manually verify every button in no-click-controls.md remained untriggered.
Manually inspect safe-screenshots/ for no email, balance, account ID, or private profile data.

zh: 不要把登录态截图直接公开。
所有账号操作必须由用户亲自确认。
检查结论只覆盖已查看页面。
en: Do not publish signed-in screenshots directly.
All account actions require direct user confirmation.
Findings cover only pages that were inspected.

trigger.zh: 登录态页面需要检查信息是否完整，但不能修改账号、配置或数据。
trigger.en: A signed-in page needed information review without changing account, settings, or data.

firstSignal.zh: 页面含有导出和邀请按钮，必须明确不点击。
firstSignal.en: The page included export and invite buttons that had to be explicitly avoided.

doneSignal.zh: 完成 6 个只读检查点，未触发表单提交或写入动作。
doneSignal.en: Six read-only checkpoints were completed without form submission or write actions.
